## Problem statement

What pain point are you trying to solve?

## Proposed solution

What behavior or command flow do you want?

## Alternatives considered

What options did you evaluate?

## Safety impact

How should this interact with dry-run defaults, override policy, and fail-closed behavior?

## Additional context

Links, examples, or prior art.
